task: Ship to Prod hackathon: meta-agent that helps enterprises build their own PCC agent. Use sponsors to win multiple tracks.

phases.name: Intake + Dashboard
phases.notes: dashboard up :3457, Guild CLI installed, repos cloned

phases.name: Wheel-Scout
phases.notes: sponsors are mandatory; landscape = sponsor list

phases.name: Parallel Research
phases.notes: 7/7 scouts done: luma+judges, Guild, Redis+TinyFish, InsForge+Ghost, Chainguard, payment rails, PCC internal

phases.name: Team Hand-off + Impl
phases.notes: INTEGRATION-TASKS.md written; PLAN-V3 final; user rescoped to meta-agent + Vapi voice

agents.name: scout-bravo
agents.summary: Guild = OpenAPI custom integration auto-generates tools; no external npm in agent code

agents.name: scout-charlie

agents.name: scout-delta
agents.summary: InsForge /agents/v1/signup 60s instant backend; Ghost = Tiger Data agentic Postgres 20+ MCP tools

agents.name: scout-echo
agents.summary: Chainguard cgr.dev base image + .npmrc Libraries + cgstart skill

agents.name: scout-foxtrot
agents.summary: x402+CDP+agentic.market OK; cited.md is Senso $2.5K/mo product — dropped

agents.name: scout-golf
agents.summary: PCC: 27 packages, 34 a2a intents, 219 agent-package tools, 80+ routes

events.message: All 7 scouts returned (Chainguard, Redis+TinyFish, InsForge+Ghost, payment rails, luma, PCC internal, Guild)
Rescoped to meta-agent factory per user; Vapi voice added

decisions: Meta-agent architecture: 2-layer (Guild-thin + Node backend) due to Guild SDK constraints
Demo via Guild chat OR Vapi phone; web UI is backup
Fake enterprise: Oakland Titanium Mills (fixture HTML)
